problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
hypothesis: The key to Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? is Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation — specifically Mitochondrial membrane potential — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
